title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM TV (Trial Visits) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM TV (Trial Visits) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw trial visits data, (2) Derive USUBJID and TVSEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: VISITNUM, VISIT, VISTPT, VISTPTREF, (4) Handle visit numbering, visit timing reference points, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 11 records.
